variants: Hiroto Kume is a renowned professional in Dance Therapy, where he employs dance as a method for healing and personal expression. His doctoral adviser, Metodi Naydenov, was pivotal in guiding him through his education and shaping his therapeutic techniques. Throughout his career, Hiroto has garnered funding primarily from Verdant Canopy Grants, which support his artistic projects. He is also certified with a Balloon Artisan Document, showcasing his diverse range of skills. His research and innovative ideas have been published by Northern Fable House, a respected venue in his field.
